raw_consumer_statement: This is on a Best Buy Citi credit card. On XX/XX/year>, my card was charged for XXXX transactions fraudulently. There were XXXX charges of XXXX. I called immediately to report this as fraud. They said they would close it and report it as well as send a new card. They sent a new card out but when I called back XXXX weeks later to tell them the charges were still there, they said no one had reported it. They said to wait 60-90 days. Fast forward to XX/XX/year>, I got a letter in the mail saying they completed the investigation and were removing the charges from my account. I waited an additional week before calling back. The charges were still there so they said they would put in a dispute and that it would be another 45 days. I have called on 4-5 separate occasions. I keep getting calls from them to make my payment. I had a near perfect credit score before this and now it has been tanked. My wife and I are in the process of building a house as well as needing a new vehicle. I cant do either until this is resolved. I am absolutely XXXX because I have done everything right and cant get a person on the line that seems to be from XXXX. They keep putting it off. I just called again today and they said I have to call another number again tomorrow. Please lord XXXX help me. Thank you.
